specific_question: How many staff retreats did the Customer Service Team have in 2024?
answer: In 2024, the Customer Service Team had 3 staff retreats, in March, July, and November. During these all-day meetings, the team focused on strategizing new initiatives to increase sales and customer retention for the 2025 year.
dr_question: With the reported slowdown in the sales of electric vehicles (EV), how can after sales products and customer service strategies help our company remain successful in 2026?
